Foundation.status: The platform foundation is being prepared.
Foundation.title: بيتي بذوقي

NotFound.description: The requested page could not be found.
NotFound.title: Page not found

footer.description: An Arabic-first platform for made-to-order furniture, from idea to handoff.
footer.note: Every design is reviewed and quoted by the workshop before production starts.

home.title: Furniture for your home, made to your taste.
home.description: Explore configurable designs, then work directly with the workshop to approve dimensions, materials, and details before pricing and production.
home.featuredTitle: A starting point for your next project
home.differenceTitle: Not a shopping cart; a considered design journey.
home.differenceOneDescription: Begin with a design direction, then adapt it to your home and needs.
home.differenceTwoDescription: The workshop checks dimensions, materials, and feasibility before quoting.
home.differenceThreeDescription: Production starts only after quotation acceptance and manual payment verification.
home.journeyTitle: From a design to a piece made for you.
home.journeyDescription: See the stages that keep details, pricing, and production status clear.

catalog.title: Start with a design, then make it fit your home.
catalog.description: Every item is a configurable template within workshop capabilities, not stocked furniture for instant shipping.
catalog.count: {count, plural, =0 {No designs} one {One design} other {# designs}}
catalog.emptyDescription: Try a simpler term or view every available type.

product.customizationTitle: Final details are shaped around your space.
product.customizationDescription: Precise options depend on what the manager publishes for each design and are reviewed before the quotation is fixed.
product.dimensionsDescription: Defined within the design rules and manufacturing capabilities.
product.materialsDescription: Choose from materials approved for this design.
product.colorsDescription: Only available colors are shown, with room to explain preferences.
product.quotationDescription: There is no direct checkout; the manager sends a quotation after review.

process.title: A clear journey from idea to handoff.
process.description: The process reduces misunderstandings while keeping final decisions with the customer and workshop.
process.stepOneDescription: Browse published designs and select the pieces that fit your idea.
process.stepTwoDescription: After signing in, combine one or more items and add customizations and notes.
process.stepThreeDescription: The workshop reviews feasibility and details, then sends a clear quotation for approval.
process.stepFourDescription: Upload bank-transfer proof; production starts only after manual payment verification.
process.stepFiveDescription: Follow the order until it is ready, then receive delivery or pickup as agreed.
process.ctaDescription: There is no commitment or direct payment while browsing.
